name: AIC Mines Limited
description: AIC Mines Limited is an ASX-listed growth-focused resources company focused on exploring, developing, and mining gold and copper resources in Australia. The company's flagship asset is the Eloise Copper Mine, a high-grade underground mine located in North Queensland. Additionally, AIC Mines holds a portfolio of highly prospective exploration projects, including the Jericho copper deposit and the Marymia project, targeting gold and copper mineralization.
